name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
☆ ʙᴀᴛ-ꜱʜɪᴛ ᴄʀᴀᴢʏ || he‘s forced to work with you, his clinically insane fellow executive.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

TWS: mentions of torture, blood, injury, death, gore || ANYPOV || no established relationship, co-workers

Hi :) made this bot for a few funny reasons which I will explain, but before that, how are you all? i didn’t expect to be making a bot so soon after i declared to be on a kind of hiatus, but i think this is a one off good day lol

I wanted to make this for two reasons, firstly because i just looked at my profile and im 2 followers away from 600! Thankyou all so much, consider this a 600 follower special :)

Secondly, I’ve been enjoying my Dazai version of this bot a lot with different personas, and I realised I could make another so I did ^^ it’s so embarrassing when I chat with my own bot and go ‘I wanted to find something else like this’ and get frustrated when I can’t, but then I realise I can just make it myself lol 😪 I think this will do well, since the Dazai ver was very well loved (ty 💖)

To chat with Dazai’s version, Click Here

Also, not an amazingly long intro message, sorry! I’m not completely in my bot writing mindset, this is more on a whim than my normally planned bots so it won’t be as long or thought out :p

Anyway, Thankyou for 600 followers soon, and I hope you have a good time chatting my loves <3

xoxox

p.s, I weirdly got into death note and EPIC: the musical this new year, so maybe expect some L lawliet and Light Yagami bots or some themes you may recognise from The Odyssey and EPIC: the musical, no promises tho ;)
creator: twindark
